name: Chicken Spectacular
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz) cut green beans, drained
1 can (10.75 oz) cream of celery soup
1 can (6-8.5 oz) water chestnuts, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Pour into a greased Crock-Pot.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
Serves 4
